title: Best Eye Hospital in Delhi | Advanced Eye Care at Save Sight Centre
heading: Get Eye Care at The Best Eye Hospital in Delhi
description: Save Sight Centre is a NABH-accredited eye hospital in Delhi, provided advanced eye care to 1,62,000+ patients of all ages for last 15 years under one roof.
text:

For patients of every age, we are delivering the finest eye care services as our core. We have treated more than 1,60,000+ patients in the course of 15 years which speaks volumes about our dedication to excellence as well, with them, we make sure that bow their vision and eyes are safeguarded and nurtured all the time. Being NABH and ISO accredited eye hospitals we cater to providing the best in the world’s Technology of eye care. Our panel of professional ophthalmologists, assembled together by Dr. Rajeev Jain who is a director and founder, is able to skillfully cater to intricate procedures and complicated eye care solutions. This eye care facility is undoubtedly the best for all types of eye care including regular check-ups and even complicated evaluations as well as surgeries. Comprehensive Eye Care Services At Save Sight Centre, we offer variety of eye care that include specialized ones. Each of these services targets specific conditions or difficulties. Here are some of them that we offer: Cataract Removal If you see cloudy even with specs and your daily chores are getting affected. It may be Cataract, Surgery is the only option to treat it. So, get Cataract Surgery with the experts and advanced methods like MICS and PHACO. Read More Cataract Surgery Refractive Surgery If you’re tired of using contact lenses or glasses, our vision correction options such as LASIK, ICL, IPCL or other refractive surgeries like CLE, RLE, can be the best option for you. No matter what’s your number, our refractive surgeons cover a range of solutions to help you with your eye and vision issues. Read More Refractive Surgery Retina and Uvea Care Diabetic Retinopathy, Macular Degeneration and Retinal Tears or Detachments, and Uveitis, are few of the retinal disorders which can be cared for by Dr. Rajeev Jain (Retina Specialist), along with our other specialists. The focus on these issues is ensuring the vision is preserved through quick diagnosis and treatment. Read More Retina and Uvea Care Glaucoma Treatment Glaucoma also said to be “silent thief of sight” is another issue which needs to be expertly managed and at Save Sight Centre we provide comprehensive diagnostic services as well as a range of treatment plans for those diagnosed with glaucoma. Read More Glaucoma Treatment Pediatric Eye Care Children need a unique approach towards their care due to their growing eyes and a multitude of problems which might arise. At the Save Sight Centre our pediatric eye specialist will provide unsolicited yet needed services such as treating children with squint, amblyopia or other refractive errors, all in a friendly atmosphere. Read More Pediatric Eye Care Cornea and External Diseases We serve in diagnosis of various external eye diseases including corneal infections, keratoconus, dry eye syndrome and many more. Read More Cornea and External Diseases Oculoplasty Our oculoplasty service involves reconstructive and cosmetic surgery for eyelids, tear ducts and orbital structures. It doesn’t matter if the treatments are functional or aesthetic, we do it to perfection. Read More Oculoplasty Vision Therapy and Low Vision Aids As for patients who complain of poor or discomfort in vision, we have therapy programs and low vision aids which helps in the improvement of visual function thus enhancing the quality of life. Read More Vision Therapy and Low Vision Aids Contact Lens Clinic In our contact lens clinic, we have our patients’ needs taken care of as this ranges from general requirements to specialty lenses such as post keratoconus surgery and post-surgical contact lenses. Read More Contact Lens Clinic Myopia Clinic Myopia, or nearsightedness, has become very prevalent and the age of onset is lower and lower every day. In our Myopia Clinic, we treat the Myopia and its progression with special focus on detection and treatment in children and adult. Read More Myopia Clinic Squint Treatment If your eyes seem misaligned or you experience double vision, it could be a squint. At Save Sight Centre, we offer advanced squint correction for children and adults through both non-surgical and surgical options. Read More Squint Treatment Ortho-K lenses Ortho-K lenses gently reshape your cornea overnight, giving you freedom from glasses or contacts and 6/6 vision. Ideal for myopia control in kids and specs removal in adults. Read More Ortho-K lenses Why Choose Save Sight Centre? What services does Save Sight Centre offer? We offer all eye care services under one roof. It includes: Routine eye exams Diagnosis and treatment of eye conditions such as glaucoma, cataract, uveitis, and macular degeneration Glass Removal Refractive Surgeries are also available like SmartSurf, Femto, Trans PRK, Contoura Vision, SBK, ICL, IPCL, RLE, CLE, etc. Pediatric eye care Contact lens fitting Treatment for diabetic eye problems and much more. 02. How often should I get an eye exam? It’s recommended to have an eye exam every 6 Months- 1 year, especially after the age of 40 or if you have any existing eye conditions or a family history of eye disease. Children should have their first eye exam at 6 months, then at age 3, and again before starting school. 03. What are the symptoms that require an eye exam? If you experience any of the following symptoms, we recommend scheduling an eye exam: Blurred or double vision Eye strain or discomfort Difficulty reading or seeing at night Frequent headaches Sudden loss of vision or flashes of light Red, swollen, or painful eyes 04. Are your eye exams covered by insurance? Yes, we accept a variety of health insurance plans. You can check TPA and Govt Panels or contact us directly to check if your specific insurance provider is covered. We also offer affordable payment options for patients without insurance like EMI options. 05. Why Save Sight Centre is considered as the best eye hospital in Delhi? Every patient looks for a place where his/her eye problems can be diagnosed and treated by an expert and experienced eye specialist. We at Save Sight Centre works for patient-centred approaches by using latest technology. Our eye care services have been satisfying more than 1.50 lacs patients for past 14 years. If you are in Delhi and NCR, you can just reach us for all eye care services under one roof at A-14, Adarsh Nagar (Opposite Adarsh Nagar Metro Station), Delhi-110033. 06. Can children get eye exams and wear glasses? Yes, children should have regular eye exams to detect any vision problems early. Conditions like nearsightedness (myopia) or astigmatism are common in children. We offer pediatric eye exams and provide a wide range of stylish, durable glasses for kids. 07. Can I get an eye exam if I don’t have any vision problems? Yes, routine eye exams are important even if you don't have noticeable vision problems. Many eye conditions, like glaucoma, can develop without obvious symptoms. Regular exams help detect these issues early and ensure the overall health of your eyes. 08. How can I prevent eye problems as I get older? To maintain healthy eyes as you age, consider the following tips: Protect your eyes from UV rays with sunglasses Eat a balanced diet rich in vitamins and minerals Don't smoke Manage chronic conditions like diabetes and hypertension Get regular eye exams to catch any issues early 09. What should I do if I have an eye emergency? If you experience an eye emergency, such as sudden vision loss, eye injury, or severe pain, seek medical attention immediately. On our working days and time you can call for urgent care or go to the nearest emergency ward. Quick action is important in preventing long-term damage. 10. How can I schedule an appointment at Save Sight Centre? You can easily schedule an appointment by: Calling our office at 011-47002220, 011-45052220, and +91-9210914391 Booking online through our website We’ll help find a time that works best for you! × OPTOMETRY INTERNSHIP UPDATE!
